channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg kicks off
item.description: It's time for everyone to start their engines as the Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg kicks off on Friday, February 28.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Shedeur Sanders and Cam Ward will not work out at NFL scouting combine
item.description: Shedeur Sanders and Cam Ward, the top two quarterbacks in this year's NFL draft, are both opting out of workouts at the league's annual scouting combine in Indianapolis.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Thursday’s CCS basketball semifinals: Top storylines, surprises, trends, more
item.description: Palo Alto boys heat up late to beat Leigh. Mills girls roll to set up title game rematch with Notre Dame-San Jose. The King's Academy boys top SHP to reach Division IV final.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: LSU track athlete dead at 18 after fiery car wreck on school's campus
item.description: Dillon Reidenauer, an LSU pole vaulter, was one of two people killed in a fiery car crash on the school's campus this week. She was 18 years old.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jordan Chiles explains why she thinks she will 'never' talk to Simone Biles about Larry Nassar's abuse
item.description: While Jordan Chiles and Simone Biles have made history together, Chiles said she will likely "never" discuss Larry Nassar with Biles, one of his victims.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Tight ends and defensive backs
item.description: At the NFL Scouting Combine, defensive backs and tight ends are going through drills at Lucas Oil Stadium, with prospects like Gunnar Helm, Harold Fannin Jr., Malaki Starks, Sebastian Castro, and Kevin Winston Jr. showcasing their skills and potential to contribute to NFL teams.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Yankees legend Bernie Williams using his music to help those affected by disease that took his father's life
item.description: Bernie Williams is known for his years with the New York Yankees, but music has been his main passion since leaving the game. He now uses that platform to honor his father's legacy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL coaches value face-to-face interviews with draft prospects at the scouting combine
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — DeMeco Ryans has experienced the NFL scouting combine as a player, assistant coach and head coach. He values the opportunity to meet draft prospects this week.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: In dominant triple-double performance, Pelicans' Zion Williamson provides reminder of his talent
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — The injuries have taken on toll on Zion Williamson during his six-year NBA career. So have the losses. But on nights like Thursday, there are tantalizing reminders of how much talent the 2019 No. 1 overall pick still possesses.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Southern California, UCLA, Texas and Notre Dame are projected top seeds in women's NCAA Tournament
item.description: JuJu Watkins and Southern California have moved up to a No. 1 seed in the women's NCAA Tournament in the latest projections of the top teams.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Davis beats Herriman to win 6A state title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a battle of the top two 6A boys basketball teams, Davis proved to be the best in the state. Coleman Atwater poured in 24 points, while Bode Sparrow added 16 as the #2 seeded Darts knocked off top-seeded Herriman, 75-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jose Mourinho banned for four matches and fined after Turkish referees comment
item.description: Fenerbahce manager Jose Mourinho has been given a four-match ban and fined by the Turkish Football Federation following his comments about Turkish referees after a match at Galatasaray on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: No. 5 UConn claims 5th straight Big East regular-season title with 72-53 win over No. 22 Creighton
item.description: HARTFORD, Conn. (AP) — Sarah Strong had 22 points and nine rebounds and Paige Bueckers added 15 points, seven rebounds and seven assists as No. 5 UConn defeated No. 22 Creighton 72-53 on Thursday night and claimed its fifth straight Big East regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: JIM FULLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boys Basketball: St. Augustine 62, Sage Creek 39
item.description: Lead by PPR Gala Awards Special Teams Player of the Year Pai Polamalu, the Saintsmen handily beat the Bobcats 62-39 to advance to the D1 finals against Victory Christian Academy.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: PGA Tour star Billy Horschel shoos gator off course with golf club in wild scene
item.description: PGA Tour star Billy Horschel sprang into action Thursday during the opening round of the Cognizant Classic, shooing a gator back into the water with his 60-degree wedge.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: White Sox outfielder Andrew Benintendi out 4 to 6 weeks with broken hand after being hit by pitch
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Chicago White Sox left fielder Andrew Benintendi will miss four to six weeks with a broken hand after being hit by a pitch in a spring training game on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce plans to play next season rather than retire
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Kansas City Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce plans to play next season rather than retire. The 35-year-old Kelce had been mulling whether to return for a 13th season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Defensive linemen and linebackers
item.description: The NFL Scouting Combine is showcasing top defensive line and linebacker prospects, including James Pearce Jr., Mykel Williams, Mike Green, Shemar Stewart, Jack Sawyer, Donovan Ezeiruaku, Landon Jackson, Princely Umanmielen, Mason Graham, and Kenneth Grant.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: BYU drains 17 three-pointers in 91-81 win over ASU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 26 points, Trevin Knell added 18 and No. 25 BYU beat short-handed Arizona State 91-81 on Wednesday night to extend its winning streak to five games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Maine lawmaker censured for posting picture of trans student on Facebook
item.description: (NewsNation) — A state representative in Maine was censured by other members of the legislature after posting a picture of a trans teen girl on her public Facebook page. The resolution passed 75-70 in a party-line vote, the Portland Press-Herald reported. Per Maine House rules, Republican Rep.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Girls Softball: Christian 5, El Capitan 3
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Spring sports underway with Christian beating El Capitan on Monday afternoon 5-3. Patriots were lead by Ava Barrios, Long Beach State commit was dominate in the circle going five innings with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Cleveland Guardians owner Lawrence J. Dolan dies at 94
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lawrence J. Dolan, owner of Cleveland's Major League Baseball team since 2000, has died. He was 94. Dolan died Sunday night of natural causes, the Cleveland Guardians said Monday in a statement. “Mr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mystics trade 2-time All-Star Ariel Atkins to the Sky for No. 3 pick in WNBA draft
item.description: The Washington Mystics accelerated their rebuild, trading two-time All-Star Ariel Atkins to the Chicago Sky for the No. 3 overall pick in this year's draft on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bell takes only lead in OT to edge Hocevar, Larson in another thrilling NASCAR finish in Atlanta
item.description: Christopher Bell celebrated a drought-ending victory for himself and Joe Gibbs Racing after a dramatic comeback in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Sky acquire 2-time All-Star Atkins from Washington Mystics for 2025 No. 3 pick
item.description: The Chicago Sky have traded their top pick in the upcoming WNBA draft for two-time All-Star guard Ariel Atkins from the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: RSL gets shut out in MLS season opener by San Jose
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - From San Jose, Costa Rica to San Jose, California, Real Salt Lake has not been able to score a goal in this early part of the 2025 season. After a scoreless draw in the CONCACAF Champions Cup opener against C.S.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State sweeps San Diego State, 79-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For just the second time first since joining the Mountain West Conference, Utah State sweeps San Diego State. Dexter Akanno scored a career-high 26 points, making 7-of-9 three-pointers to lead the Aggies to a 79-71 win over the Aztecs Saturday night at The Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Briscoe tries to move past devastating penalties and Blaney to start on pole in NASCAR Atlanta race
item.description: A massive fine left Chase Briscoe facing a huge points deficit heading into Sunday's NASCAR Cup Series race at Atlanta Motor Speedway.
item.dc:creator: Charles Odum, Fox 5

item.title: Thunder cruise past Jazz in first game after break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 21 points and the West-leading Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Utah Jazz 130-107 on Friday night for their eighth victory in nine games. Chet Holmgren added 20 points for the Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: One-armed basketball player makes history with basket
item.description: When her high school basketball coach cut her from the team senior year, Baileigh Sinaman-Daniel refused to let that rejection, or the fact she was born with one arm, end her dream.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
